title: Hearth Huddle
description: A mobile-first social party game web app for in-person play. Players pass a single phone around to take turns across 5 original games.
highlights: Designed and built 5 original party games — social deduction, co-op improv, and voting formats — all playable pass-and-play on a single phone
SSR with TanStack Start (React 19) deployed to Cloudflare Workers via Wrangler for globally low-latency edge rendering
Type-safe file-based routing via TanStack Router with Framer Motion handling per-game animation sequences
